title: Delete CLI binary, create /gruai-agents and /gruai-config skills
description: Replace CLI init/update commands with Claude Code skills. Delete CLI code, keep templates.

scope.in: Delete cli/commands/ and cli/index.ts. Remove bin and build:cli from package.json. Keep cli/templates/. Create /gruai-agents skill and /gruai-config skill.

tasks.title: Delete CLI commands and clean package.json

dod.criterion: package.json: bin field removed, build:cli script removed, dist-cli removed from files array

Skill instructs the LLM to: read cli/templates/agent-roles/*.md, generate random names, render templates with {{NAME}}/{{FIRST_NAME}}/{{FIRST_NAME_LOWER}}, create .claude/agents/*.md files, create .claude/agent-registry.json with full schema (agents + teams), scaffold .context/ tree, create CLAUDE.md and gruai.config.json
Skill references existing templates in cli/templates/ — does NOT embed template content inline

Skill instructs the LLM to: backup existing .claude/skills/ to .gruai-backup/{timestamp}/, copy latest skill files from package source, re-render CLAUDE.md preserving existing agent names from agent-registry.json
Skill explicitly states: does NOT overwrite .context/, agent-registry.json, or .claude/agents/*.md

tasks.title: Update README.md to reference skills instead of CLI

dod.criterion: README.md quickstart uses /gruai-agents instead of npx gruai init
README.md references /gruai-config instead of npx gruai update
No remaining references to gruai CLI commands in README
